text:
ナベリウスの凍土に生息する原生生物は
森林の比じゃないくらい強いから
流石のアンタでもきっついわよー？

無理しなくてもいいからね。
もちろん、ダメだったら
「へっぽこぴー」に逆戻りだけど。

いや、この一回で逆戻りも
ちょっとかわいそう……かな？
なんにせよ、頑張りなさいって

The sylvants of the Naverius Tundra put their
Forest counterparts to shame. Surely even YOU
run the risk of freezing there, yeah?

You don't have to stick your neck out too far
on this one. Of course, if you DO back out,
I'm demoting you back to clown status.

Then again, maybe one wuss-out isn't
enough to justify that harsh of a punishment...
Meh, I dunno. Anyway, go get 'em!
